# Credential Management

> Manage stored auth tokens and service profiles.

## Tools

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:START -->
| Tool | Description | Parameters |
|------|-------------|------------|
| `list_credentials` | List all stored service credentials (keys only, not values). | — |
| `store_credential` | Manually store a credential for a service. | `service`, `key`, `value` |
| `list_profiles` | List all stored profiles for a service. Profiles are named credential sets (e.g. linkedin:personal, linkedin:business). The default profile has no suffix. | `service` |
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:END -->
